# neon_set_default_branch (Action)

Sets a branch as the default branch for a Neon project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "neon_set_default_branch" "example" {
  project_id = neon_project.example.id
  branch_id  = neon_branch.example.id
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID to set as the default.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
